arts.ttl: Southampton vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham face bottom-of-the-table Southampton as they try to bounce back from a tough spell. Both sides like to play expansive football and will be sensing vulnerability in each other this weekend. Southampton have a slight advantage over Spurs having had a full week’s rest after their narrow defeat to Aston Villa. Russell Martin will continue […] The post Southampton vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Southampton vs Tottenham TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Spurs will go into the match as favourites with the Saints currently sitting bottom of the Premier League, having won one and drew two of their opening 15 games. Before any of the weekend’s Premier League games, Spurs sit in 11th place in the table but will be hoping the position improves by the end of the weekend.

arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou told off Pedro Porro for on the pitch after Tottenham's Rangers draw
arts.sum: Rangers won many of the physical battles against Tottenham on the night and Postecoglou was asked whether he has enough fighters in his squad, both in all and available right now to him. Ange Postecoglou admits he gave Pedro Porro some constructive feedback on the pitch following Tottenham's draw at Rangers on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Tottenham's unusual Premier League kick-off time explained
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will travel to the South Coast on Sunday for the unusual kick-off time of 7pm to face Southampton in the Premier League. On normal Premier League weekends, the timeslots for matches are rigid and have become a staple for football fans up and down the country.

arts.ttl: Can Liverpool star Andy Robertson face Tottenham after red card vs Fulham
arts.sum: This means Robertson will serve his one-game suspension when Liverpool travel to face Southampton in the Carabao Cup on Wednesday night. Liverpool left-back Andy Robertson is set to serve a one-match suspension after he was given a straight red card during the Reds' Premier League match against Fulham on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to 'extraordinary' issues with rallying cry to Spurs stars
arts.sum: Pressure is mounting on Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou to find answers for his injury-hit side's recent struggles which see Spurs head to Southampton looking to end a run of five games without a win - without nine senior players

arts.ttl: Archie Gray reveals how he feels playing at centre-back as Ange Postecoglou turns to him in unfamiliar role amid injury crisis - and the Spurs teen could become impossible to dislodge
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: As Postecoglou was demanding senior players step up and take responsibility, Archie Gray was inadvertently proving the point by promising to study hard for a new role.
